title: Take Me Home
writer: Ethel Doherty, Grover Jones, Thomas J. Crizer
actors: Bebe Daniels, Neil Hamilton, Lilyan Tashman
plot: A 1928 silent comedy produced by Famous Players-Lasky and distributed by Paramount Pictures. It was directed by Marshall Neilan and starred Bebe Daniels and Neil Hamilton. It is now considered lost.
